candidates.resume:

interview_feedback.notes: Excellent systems thinking, designed a robust local-first caching layer for agent runs.

feedback.content: I successfully launched the new 1:1 notes tracking dashboard last week, which has already been adopted by 15 teams.
Morgan did a stellar job delivering the 1:1 dashboard launch last week. She is sometimes bossy in meetings when trying to push decisions, but her technical execution is strong.
Morgan is a highly dedicated engineer. She helped me debug my local environment on my second day and explained the database relationships clearly. She is very assertive and drives results.
